column.name: Name
customXml.name: Name
customXml.title: Custom XML Attributes
desc.airBrake.drag: Drag coefficient added when the air brake is deployed.
desc.beaconLight.input: Input expression. Controls the light flashing pattern.
desc.beaconLight.showHalo: Whether to show the light halo effect.
desc.cameraVantage.autoOrient: Whether to auto-orient toward flight direction.
desc.cameraVantage.autoZoomOnCockpit: Whether to auto-zoom in cockpit view.
desc.cameraVantage.hidePart: Whether to hide the part model.
desc.cameraVantage.name: Camera name.
desc.cannon.ammoCount: Ammo count. Changes take effect immediately.
desc.cannon.firingDelay: Firing delay in seconds between shots.
desc.cannon.muzzleBrake: Whether the cannon has a muzzle brake.
desc.canopy.dragWhenOpen: Drag coefficient added when the canopy is open.
desc.canopy.hasAnimation: Whether the canopy has an open/close animation.
desc.canopy.opacity: Canopy opacity. 0 is fully transparent, 1 is fully opaque.
desc.cockpit.hasCamera: Whether cockpit camera view is enabled.
desc.cockpit.primaryCockpit: Whether this is the primary cockpit. Flight camera follows this during flight.
desc.cockpitButton.buttonInteractionType: Button interaction type (Press, Toggle, Hold, etc.).
desc.cockpitButton.buttonLightTransition: Button light transition delay in seconds.
Button light transition duration in seconds.
desc.cockpitButton.buttonPositionTransit: Button position animation delay in seconds.
Button position animation duration in seconds.
desc.cockpitButton.input: Input identifier bound to the button.
desc.cockpitSwitch.input: Input identifier bound to the switch.
desc.cockpitSwitch.switchPositionTransit: Switch position animation delay in seconds.
Switch position animation duration in seconds.
desc.controlSurface.activationGroup: Activation group number. The surface responds to input only when this group is active.
desc.controlSurface.activationGroupLocks: Whether to lock (instead of zero) input when the activation group is off.
desc.controlSurface.activationString: Activation expression replacing simple activation group logic.
desc.controlSurface.autoInvert: Whether to automatically invert the surface direction on mirror.
desc.controlSurface.end: Surface end position (section index along wingspan).
desc.controlSurface.inputId: Input identifier. Binds to Roll, Pitch, Yaw, etc. control axes.
desc.controlSurface.invert: Whether to invert the surface deflection direction.
desc.controlSurface.start: Surface start position (section index along wingspan).
desc.detacher.attachPointsToDetach: List of attach point indices to disconnect on detach.
desc.detacher.delay: Delay in seconds after activation before detaching.
desc.detacher.designerForce: Force applied when detaching in the designer.
desc.detacher.detacherForce: Force applied when detaching during flight.
desc.detacher.direction: Detach direction (Default, Forward, Backward, Upward, Downward, etc.).
desc.detacher.enabled: Whether the detach feature is enabled.
desc.engine.alphaTiedToThrottle: Whether exhaust flame opacity follows throttle.
desc.engine.ductedThrust: Whether to enable ducted thrust mode.
desc.engine.powerMultiplier: Power/thrust multiplier applied on top of base power.
desc.engine.requiredAirIntake: Required air intake ratio. Power drops when intake is below this value.
desc.engine.throttleResponse: Throttle response speed. Higher values reach target thrust faster.
desc.floatingPart.reduceBuoyancyIfBySelf: Whether to reduce buoyancy when placed alone.
desc.floatingPart.weightFactor: Buoyancy weight factor. Higher values increase buoyancy.
desc.fuelTank.fuel: Current fuel amount in liters. Changes are reflected immediately.
desc.fuelTank.mass: Tank structural mass in kg, excluding fuel mass.
desc.gun.minTimeBetweenRounds: Minimum time between rounds in seconds.
desc.gun.roundsPerSecond: Fire rate in rounds per second.
desc.gyroscope.autoOrient: Whether to automatically orient toward the target heading.
desc.gyroscope.pitchEnabled: Whether pitch axis stabilization is enabled.
desc.gyroscope.rollEnabled: Whether roll axis stabilization is enabled.
desc.gyroscope.stability: Stability strength. Higher values resist deviation more.
desc.inlet.airIntakeMultiplier: Air intake multiplier. 1.0 means original intake.
desc.inputController.activationGroup: Activation group number. Controls which group toggles this input controller.
desc.inputController.input: Input expression. Supports Throttle, Brake, Roll, Pitch, Yaw, VTOL variables and math operations.
desc.inputController.invert: Whether to invert the input direction.
desc.inputController.invertOnMirror: Whether to automatically invert input direction on mirrored parts.
desc.inputController.maxValue: Maximum output value. The output will not exceed this value.
desc.inputController.minValue: Minimum output value. The output will not go below this value.
desc.inputController.name: Display name of the input controller.
desc.inputController.zeroOnDeactivate: Whether to zero the output when the activation group is off.
desc.jDriveHub.isReversed: Whether to reverse hub rotation direction.
desc.jDriveShaft.allowTransformation: Whether the drive shaft can be scaled and transformed.
desc.jDriveShaft.bootA: Whether boot A (dust cover) is present.
desc.jDriveShaft.bootB: Whether boot B (dust cover) is present.
desc.jDriveShaft.isVisual: Whether the drive shaft is visual-only (does not transmit power).
desc.jFuselage.autoResizeOnConnected: Whether to auto-resize length when connected to other parts.
desc.jFuselage.isCone: Whether this is a cone fuselage.
desc.jTransmission.postShiftBan: Post-shift power ban duration in seconds.
desc.jWing.disableWingtipVortices: Whether to disable wingtip vortex effects.
desc.jWing.fuelFraction: Fuel fraction of total tank capacity (0-1).
desc.jWing.liftScale: Lift scale multiplier. 1.0 means original lift.
desc.jetEngine.hasAfterburner: Whether the engine has an afterburner.
desc.jetEngine.hasReverseThrust: Whether the engine has reverse thrust capability.
desc.jetEngine.maxGimbalAngle: Maximum thrust vectoring angle in degrees.
desc.mfd.name: Display name.
desc.missile.maxFuelTime: Maximum fuel burn time in seconds.
desc.missile.waterproof: Whether the missile is waterproof (can be launched from water).
desc.partData.allowTransformation: Whether the part can be scaled and transformed in the designer. When off, the part cannot be dragged to resize.
desc.partData.attachPoints: List of attachment points. Each defines a position and direction where other parts can snap on.
desc.partData.centerOfMass: Center of mass offset relative to the part origin (x,y,z). Affects overall craft balance.
desc.partData.decals: List of decals applied to the part. Decals are extra texture overlays on the part surface.
desc.partData.disableAircraftCollisions: Whether to disable collision between this part and other parts on the same aircraft. When on, the part will not collide with its own craft.
desc.partData.dragScale: Drag scale multiplier applied on top of base drag values. 1.0 means original drag.
desc.partData.dragType: Current effective drag type (Default/Standard/OccludeOnly/None). May be modified at runtime by part scripts.
desc.partData.dragTypeAsConfigured: The drag type configured by the player in part settings (Default/Standard/OccludeOnly/None).
desc.partData.dragTypeDefault: Default drag type for this part type (Default/Standard/OccludeOnly/None).
desc.partData.emptyMass: Part empty mass, excluding modifier-added mass and fuel.
desc.partData.enabled: Whether the part is enabled. Disabled parts do not participate in physics simulation.
desc.partData.groupId: Activation group number (1-8). Controls which group toggles this part on/off.
desc.partData.initialRotationMirrored: Initial rotation offset when the part was created by mirroring. Indicates whether the original rotation was flipped.
desc.partData.initiallyConnectedToMainCo: Whether the part is initially connected to the main cockpit in the designer.
desc.partData.isCockpit: Whether this part is a cockpit.
desc.partData.isPowertrainPart: Whether this part belongs to the powertrain system.
desc.partData.isUsingConstantDrag: Whether the part uses constant drag mode (drag does not change with speed).
desc.partData.loadContext: Part load context (Default/Menu/Designer/Flight/Studio). Indicates which scene loaded this part.
desc.partData.loadedMass: Loaded mass including modifiers, fuel, and all other contributions.
desc.partData.massScale: Mass scale multiplier applied on top of empty mass. 1.0 means original mass.
desc.partData.materialIds: Part material ID list (comma-separated). Each number maps to a material configuration index.
desc.partData.modifierMass: Total mass added by all modifiers on this part.
desc.partData.modifiers: List of modifiers on this part. Each modifier handles a category of behavior (engine, weapon, input control, etc.) and is shown as a separate group in the panel.
desc.partData.name: Part display name shown in the designer structure tree.
desc.partData.partCollisionResponse: Collision response mode: Default=normal collision, None=no collision (pass-through), DisconnectOnly=collision only when disconnected.
desc.partData.partConnections: List of connections to other parts. Records which parts are connected via attachment points.
desc.partData.partCreationInfoUsedForIni: Initialization info used when the part was created, containing extra parameters for deserialization.
desc.partData.partDrag: Part drag data object containing directional drag area coefficients (forward, back, left, right, up, down).
desc.partData.partScript: Runtime script object managing the part's lifecycle, physics updates, and game logic.
desc.partData.partType: Part type definition containing the part identifier ID, default parameters, and feature description.
desc.partData.renderQueue: Rendering queue number controlling draw order. Lower values are drawn first.
desc.partData.rotation: Part rotation angles in degrees (x,y,z), rotation around each axis.
desc.partData.sharesRigidBody: Whether this part shares a rigid body with its parent. Shared parts do not participate in physics independently.
desc.partData.symmetryDisabled: Whether symmetry mirroring is disabled for this part.
desc.partData.symmetryId: Symmetry group ID. Parts with the same ID are mirrored copies; changing one will sync the others.
desc.partData.underwaterDragScalar: Underwater drag scale multiplier applied on top of base underwater drag.
desc.partData.visibleInDesigner: Whether the part is visible in the designer. When off, the part is hidden but still exists.
desc.propeller.isManual: Whether blade pitch is manually controlled.
desc.propeller.isPushProp: Whether this is a push propeller.
desc.propeller.maxPitch: Maximum blade pitch angle in degrees.
desc.resizableWheel.hideRims: Whether to hide the wheel rims.
desc.resizableWheel.turningRate: Steering rate in degrees per second.
desc.seat.primarySeat: Whether this is the primary seat.
desc.suspension.attachPointIndex: Attach point index for suspension connection.
desc.transparency.hideBack: Whether to hide the back face.
desc.transparency.hideFront: Whether to hide the front face.
desc.transparency.hideInside: Whether to hide the inside face.
desc.transparency.opacity: Opacity. 0 is fully transparent, 1 is fully opaque.
desc.winch.attachPointIndex: Attach point index for the winch.
desc.wing.allowControlSurfaces: Whether control surfaces can be added.
desc.wing.liftScale: Lift scale multiplier. 1.0 means original lift.
expandedEditor.title: Large Text Editor
groupChooser.title: Data Groups
jfuselage.hint: Directly edits JFuselage SectionA / SectionB shape parameters. Cutting allows empty values, for example ,,0.16,.
jfuselage.title: Fuselage Shape Parameters
label.localizationNotice: Localization files live in the plugin localization folder. Copy a JSON file to add another language.
label.noDesigner: Designer was not detected. Open the designer before using this panel.
label.noPartData: A selection exists, but PartData could not be read.
label.selectionReadFailed: Failed to read the selected part. Re-select the part or re-enter the designer.
settings.hint: Saved settings are written to settings.json and persist across launches. Before updating by manually copying the whole package, back up settings.json in the plugin folder to avoid losing your configuration.
settings.title: UI Settings
settings.updateCheckEnabled: Check for updates when opening the panel
status.applied: Applied. If the data is not used during flight test, back up the craft first and then save it; if you are sure the change is safe, you can save directly.
status.copyXmlUnavailable: XML is not available for the current part
window.subtitle: Part Data
window.title: SP2 Part Data Editor
